mission.title: flatcar-container-linux: Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental Container
mission.description: Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental Container. This issue affects 10+ users.

steps.title: Identify flatcar-container-linux troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your flatcar-container-linux deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux -n flatcar-container-linux --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review flatcar-container-linux configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flatcar-container-linux configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl get configmap -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flatcar-container-linux
```
**Description**

We are not able to get sources for the kernel in the Flatcar Development container.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental Container
steps.description:
Every new release from now on will include the change, on any channel because we included the fix in every channel. Assuming you are on the Stable channel, then this workaround is only needed for versions 2345.3.1 and below.
```yaml
flatcardevelopercontainer ~ # emerge -gKv coreos-sources


!!! Error fetching binhost package info from 'http://builds.developer.core-os.net/boards/amd64-usr/2345.3.1/pkgs/'
!!! HTTP Error 404: Not Found



!!! Error fetching binhost package info from 'http://builds.developer.core-os.net/boards/amd64-usr/2345.3.1/toolchain/'
!!! HTTP Error 404: Not Found


These are the packages that would be merged, in order:

Calculating dependencies |Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM
 \Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM
 -Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM
 \Unable to enable loopbac
```

steps.title: Upgrade flatcar-container-linux to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade flatcar-container-linux:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade flatcar-container-linux flatcar-container-linux/flatcar-container-linux --namespace flatcar-container-linux
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux
helm list -n flatcar-container-linux
```

steps.title: Confirm Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux -n flatcar-container-linux --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n flatcar-container-linux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Every new release from now on will include the change, on any channel because we included the fix in every channel. Assuming you are on the Stable channel, then this workaround is only needed for versions 2345.3.1 and below.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flatcar-container-linux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
